title: verbascum × mirabile
intro: Verbascum × mirabile, also known as the 'Mirabilis' or 'Flamingo Candelabra', is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its striking, tall spikes of vibrant pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Verbascum × mirabile include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves and flowers.
